title: ipomoea cairica var. semine-glabro
intro: Ipomoea cairica var. semine-glabro, also known as the smooth seeded morning glory, is a plant species in the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea cairica var. semine-glabro can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
